{"id":"smallhold-hcj","title":"Bearer auth middleware","description":"Implement axum extractor for bearer token authentication. Steps: extract Authorization: Bearer header, SHA-256 hash the raw token, look up hash in oauth_tokens table, verify revoked_at is null, return AuthUser{account_id, scopes} to handlers. Handlers declare AuthUser as parameter to require auth. Unauthenticated requests return 401 with exact error body matching mastodon.social format.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to catalog every Mastodon endpoint auth requirement (public vs auth-required vs scope-gated).

Test discipline: valid token returns AuthUser with correct fields; invalid token returns 401 with exact error message string (compared byte-for-byte against mastodon.social); revoked token returns 401; missing header returns 401; insufficient scope (read token on write endpoint) returns 403; last_used_at updated after use. Use real in-memory SQLite not mocks.

Defensive programming: use constant-time comparison for token hash lookup to prevent timing attacks; last_used_at update spawned as background task so it does not block response; token_hash column must be UNIQUE with an index; no .unwrap() outside tests; never log token values.","acceptance_criteria":"Valid token returns AuthUser; invalid and revoked tokens return 401 with exact mastodon.social error message; scope checking returns 403; last_used_at updated non-blocking; constant-time comparison used","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:31:28Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:31:28Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-sbt","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:32:03Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
